connection_map.insight: memory is valuable when it becomes bounded reviewed candidates, not raw runtime truth
connection_map.multiplier_effect: future agents inherit the next proof needed before repeating stale launch claims

connection_map.insight: IRC/session coordination scales through state cards and digests, not transcript replay
connection_map.multiplier_effect: handoffs preserve claim boundaries even when session context is stale

connection_map.evidence: stale AutoJob Frontier KK payload blocked by active AAS boundary
connection_map.insight: cross-project intelligence compounds only when active stop-lists stay enforceable
connection_map.multiplier_effect: dream work remains pointed at CaaS/AAS instead of scattering into old wins

connection_map.insight: the strongest coordination signal can be refusing to launch without proof
connection_map.multiplier_effect: future reputation can reward proof discipline after a separate reputation gate exists

connection_map.evidence: operator cards keep exact next-proof requirements beside every bucket
connection_map.insight: quarantine does not slow product; it creates the safe order for productization
connection_map.multiplier_effect: one approved boundary can later become customer-visible without dragging unapproved neighbors

not_next_actions: Do not mount this surface as a customer/public route without a separate route preflight and approval decision.
Do not publish copy, quote pricing, launch a pilot, dispatch workers, attach reputation, or infer worker Skill DNA from this surface.
Do not write live Acontext, expose GPS/raw metadata, claim payment/production health, or create worker-copyable doctrine from this surface.

recommended_next_actions: Use the cards as an internal operator briefing before choosing any selected-boundary approval-record work.
Treat repeated prevented claims as a signal to improve proof sequencing, not as evidence that launch is ready.
If customer exposure is desired, create a separate human approval artifact naming exact text, redactions, delivery path, and still-blocked claims.
